mapper.select: SELECT C.CART_ID, C.MEMBER_NO, C.PRODUCT_ID, C.CART_QTY, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 FROM CART C JOIN PRODUCT P ON (C.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID) WHERE C.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY C.CART_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE CART SET CART_QTY = #{cartQty} WHERE CART_ID = #{cartId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM CART WHERE CART_ID IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CART WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
SELECT * FROM CART WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
